weather.title: Weather integration
weather.subtitle: Configure weather provider, polling cadence, and forecast retention. Tenant settings cascade to every farm unless overridden.

imagery.title: Imagery integration
imagery.subtitle: Configure satellite product and cloud-cover threshold. Tenant settings cascade to every farm and land unit unless overridden.
imagery.applyToBlocksHint: Apply Farm settings to every land unit:

email.title: Email server
email.subtitle: Outbound transactional email. Falls back to platform defaults when not set.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.subtitle: Outbound webhook signing and timeout. Falls back to platform defaults when not set.

section.farmHint: Pick a farm to view its resolved chain and override values for that farm only.
